title: Cross-cutting hardening & release
objective: Harden and release what PH-1 and PH-2 built: an OWASP ASVS L2 security sweep, testing hardening, production deployment with backup and warm-standby restore, and a final acceptance audit against the release gates. RECONCILIATION: the roadmap classifies P16–P19 as cross-cutting under no phase; PH-4 exists solely to satisfy the NOT NULL foreign key on slices.phase_id; the two records are consistent, not conflicting. See DEC-029 and SC-001.
exit_criteria: All four cross-cutting slices shipped and merged to main with CI green; the final release-readiness audit produced and its verdict recorded. Met: P16, P17, P18 and P19 all shipped; the audit returned a conditional no-go pending operator go-live actions, not further build work.
